docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
The Unreal Vertex Animation Toolset Plugin empowers developers by providing a complete solution for converting their current Skeletal Mesh-based characters into high-performance Vertex Animation-based Instanced Static Meshes.

With this toolset, you can effortlessly create expansive scenes populated with numerous NPC characters while maintaining a smooth and consistent frame rate.

test
